overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a dark fantasy action game featuring a character in Victorian-era clothing walking along a cobblestone railway path at night. The scene showcases a moody, atmospheric environment with dramatic blue-toned lighting, passing wooden fences and stone structures in a gothic, cliffside setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone path alongside railway tracks with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: character in long coat and hat walking steadily along the path beside railway tracks, approaching a small stone structure

metal railway tracks with wooden sleepers running along the right side
small dark stone structure or shed beside the tracks
tall rocky cliff face rising beside the railway tracks
paved stone walkway where the character is walking

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow cobblestone path beside railway tracks at night, with a wooden fence on the left and a stone cliff rising on the right. A small stone building appears ahead as the character moves forward in the moody, blue-lit environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cliffside railway path with distant mountain views

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the railway path with steady pace, the stone cliff now directly adjacent on the right

entered.detail: silhouetted mountain peaks visible on the horizon beneath the night sky

segments.scene_description: Having passed the wooden fence and small building, the character continues along the open cliffside path. The stone cliff wall looms closer on the right while distant mountains become visible on the left horizon under the starry sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path approaching a distant gothic structure

events.description: bright blue lightning flash illuminates the clouds in the night sky briefly

agents.ego_description: walking toward a distant tower structure visible ahead, maintaining steady pace along the cliffside

entered.detail: tall dark stone tower or castle structure visible in the far distance along the path

segments.scene_description: A sudden flash of blue lightning briefly lights up the night sky as the character continues walking. A distant gothic tower becomes visible ahead along the path, marking the destination or next area in the journey along the cliffside railway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moody, blue-lit railway path that transitions from a confined corridor into an expansive, storm-swept cliffside vista. It begins with the character walking beside a wooden fence and a towering stone cliff, moving steadily toward a small stone building. As the character passes the structure, the path opens up to reveal a vast horizon where distant mountains emerge under a starry night sky. The scene then shifts as a sudden flash of blue lightning illuminates the atmosphere, casting a sharp light over the terrain before finally revealing a distant gothic tower looming ahead along the railway.
